title: Prepared food planner entries with immutable product nutrition pins
summary: 완제품을 Recipe Meal과 분리해 날짜·끼니에 수량으로 추가하고 생성 순간 immutable nutrition version과 이름·브랜드를 pin하며, 기존 planner/meals read model에는 중복 없는 additive product_entries로 제공한다.
goal: 사용자가 public 또는 본인 private 완제품을 플래너에 안전하게 추가·수정·삭제하되 과거 nutrition pin과 기존 Recipe Meal shopping/cooking/leftover/status/XP workflow가 흔들리지 않게 한다.

owners.claude: replaced only for the user-approved nutrition/products/planner program; the global stage-owner policy is unchanged
owners.codex: fresh role-separated Codex tasks own Stage 1 docs, independent Stage 1.5 review and repair-final, Stage 2 backend TDD, independent Stage 3 review, Stage 4 frontend, authority precheck, Stage 5 and final authority, and Stage 6; no author or implementer self-approves

dependencies: prepared-food-catalog PR #1015 merged at b095f257a9a99f0f4952029ffd11a1036104f40f and provides owner-only private products plus immutable nutrition versions
05-planner-week-core is merged and provides recipe-only Meal planner columns and read foundations
nutrition products planner contract is locked in official requirements v1.7.20 screen v1.5.26 flow v1.3.23 database v1.3.21 and API v1.2.25
independent fresh Codex Stage 1.5 approval is required before Stage 2 starts

out_of_scope: GET planner nutrition and meal day week planned nutrition aggregation
Prepared food catalog write implementation public importer operator CLI seed runtime provider lookup or promotion
Product workflow status recipe ID shopping list ID cooked at or leftover dish ID fields
Product entry through POST meals or fake Recipe Meal creation
Actual consumption eaten skipped medical disease coaching and goal attainment
OCR barcode dining out meal kit generic preparation size edible fields
Relation chaining cross-product cross-version name brand generic density or arbitrary gram milliliter inference
Any undocumented endpoint status error code request response field workflow status or database surface
